重大頭條（股市相關） ·

外資多日買超名單速覽：金融面板與 ETF 亮眼Taiwan Stocks: Foreign Buyers’ Multi-Day Pick List

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461553

  • 連五買集中於台新新光金、友達、元大納指精選 ETF、鴻海與群創等金融、面板與科技標的。
  • 連四買組成與連五買相近，顯示外資在這批標的上維持較長天期積極布局。
  • 連三買新增英業達與富邦金，資金延伸至電子代工與大型金控股。
  • 連二買納入力積電與大成鋼，反映短天期買盤亦涵蓋半導體代工與鋼鐵族群。
  • 15 日當日買超前段為群創、富邦金、鴻海、力積電與台新新光金。

盤前列出外資連五至連二買與單日買超標的；台新新光金、該檔納指 ETF 與鴻海在多個天期重複入列，短天期則穿插英業達、富邦金、力積電與大成鋼等，呈現跨產業輪動。

  • Five-session net buys clustered around Taishin Shin Kong Financial, AUO, a Nasdaq-themed ETF, Hon Hai and Innolux.
  • The four-day lineup largely mirrors day-five picks, suggesting sustained accumulation in that basket.
  • Three-day flows added Inventec and Fubon Financial, widening bets toward EMS and major insurers.
  • Two-day buyers included Powerchip and Tatung Steel, flagging shorter plays in semiconductors and steel.
  • On the 15th, top same-day buys were Innolux, Fubon Financial, Hon Hai, Powerchip and Taishin Shin Kong Financial.

Premarket tallies show foreigners leaned on Taishin Shin Kong Financial, a Nasdaq ETF and Hon Hai across horizons; shorter windows rotated in EMS, in…
